title: LDP Form 72 – Developer Application Form
text:
COMMONWEALTH OF THE BAHAMAS
DEPARTMENT OF INLAND REVENUE
LARGE DEVELOPER PROGRAM
APPLICATION FORM FOR DEVELOPERS
A. DEVELOPER INFORMATION
1. TIN of Developer:
2. Developer Registered Name:
3. Developer Trade Name:
4. Developer Business Licence Number (BL#):
5. Developer National Insurance Board Number (NIB#):
6. Developer Filing Frequency
8. Development's Registered Name:
9. Development Location
Form 72 – LDP Application Form for Developers Page 1

B. CONTRACTOR INFORMATION
*Please attach contracts related to the contract # and contract values listed when submitting this application.
7. TIN 8. Registered Name 9. NIB # 10. BL# 11. Contract # 12. Contract Value($)
*Please note that the filing frequency for all approved contractors' and suppliers' VAT Returns will be on a monthly basis if approved.
C. SIGNATURE
13. Name of Authorized Person
14. Title of Authorized Person
15. We hereby declare that the information provided is true, correct and complete to the best of our knowledge and belief, and that we have the
authority to make this disclosure of information and declaration.
16. We hereby acknowledge that we have read and understand the Large Developer Program guidance document and we agree to the terms and conditions
contained therein.
17. Signature of Authorized Person 18. Date
Form 72 – LDP Application Form for Developers Page 2
